kept.verdict: Screenshot of an Instagram video of the business's own branded mobile grooming van/trailer — signage reads "Durban Mobile Groomers", washing/advising/styling services listed, and the phone number 068 334 7050 matches the brief exactly. Genuine, but the frame is a video thumbnail (centered play-button overlay, pillarboxed portrait crop) so it is used as a supporting gallery/fleet photo rather than the hero.
